calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2015 Set For Trial On May-18-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott T. Okamoto, Esq., (415-766-5871), for Greg Azzara as Trustee of the 147 Buena Vista Trust, Plaintiff and
Allan J. Besbris, Esq., (415-866-5000), for Golden Properties LLC, Defendant and moving party.

Court hears arguments on sanctions. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GOLDEN PROPERTIES LLC's Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action is Moot. Request for sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Okamoto, Esq. (415-766-5871) for Plaintiff and opposing party Gres Azzara as trustee of the 147 Buena Vista Trust.
Allan Besbris, Esq. (415-866-5000)for Defendant and moving party Golden Properties LLC.

Hearing is held. Plaintiff's witness Stephen Sabol is sworn and examined. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT GOLDEN PROPERTIES LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is Denied. Order is signed. Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
